author: Tarhuala
bio: Welcome to the domain of Tarhuala — where civilizations crumble, flesh twists into something unrecognizable, and the darkest corners of the human soul are laid bare. Pick a novel. Start reading.

seo.title: Tarhuala — Dark Fantasy & Apocalyptic Fiction
seo.description: Read dark fantasy and post-apocalyptic novels by Tarhuala. Dive into worlds of mutation, cults, depravity, and survival.
seo.keywords: Tarhuala, dark fantasy, web novel, apocalypse, fiction, read online
